title: taraxacum calciphilum
intro: Taraxacum calciphilum, also known as the lime-loving dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Taraxacum calciphilum are numerous, including the potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers due to its high content of antioxidants and vitamins. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum calciphilum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
